OmniDataTransform.expectedInputJson: { "DRId_InteractionSummary" : "8BVRO00000008m34AA", "DRId_Referral" : "a0GRO0000009lNa2AI", "DefaultEmailAddress" : "", "HealthAndSafety" : null, "InteractionSummaryRecordId" : "8BVRO00000008m34AA", "InteractionSummaryValue" : "adsfads", "MainReferralRecordId" : "a0GRO0000009lNa2AI", "ReferralIntakeDetails" : { "AdditionalDetails" : false, "AdditionalNotes" : { "Comments" : "adsfads" }, "Assessment" : null, "ClientDetails" : { "ClientAccountType" : "SearchExistingAccounts", "ClientEmailNew" : null, "ClientNameNew" : null, "ClientPhoneNew" : null, "ClientPreferredLanguageNew" : null, "FinalClientEmail" : null, "FinalClientPreferredLanguage" : "English", "SearchClientByName-Block" : { "ClientPreferredLanguage" : "English", "SearchClientByName" : null } }, "IsSampleAssessment1Completed" : false, "IsSampleAssessment2Completed" : false, "IsSampleAssessment3Completed" : false, "ReferralDate" : "2022-09-28", "ReferralDetails" : { "FinalReferralEmail" : null, "FinalReferrerName" : null, "ReferralAccountType" : "SearchExistingAccounts", "ReferrerEmailNew" : null, "ReferrerNameNew" : null, "ReferrerOrganizationNew" : null, "ReferrerPhoneNew" : null, "SearchReferrerByName-Block" : { "SearchReferrerByName" : null } }, "ReferralTypeSelfOrSomeone" : "false", "ShowSampleAssessment1" : false, "ShowSampleAssessment2" : false, "ShowSampleAssessment3" : false, "Title" : "adfs" }, "ReferralRecordId" : "0fhRO00000000e3YAA", "ReviewAssessments" : null, "SampleAssessment1CompletedMessage" : null, "SampleAssessment2CompletedMessage" : null, "SampleAssessment3" : null, "SampleAssessment3CompletedMessage" : null, "UploadDocuments" : null, "WorkExperience" : null, "sInstanceId" : "0kTRO000000025A2AQ", "timeStamp" : "2022-09-28T08:17:52.438Z", "userCurrencyCode" : "USD", "userId" : "005RO000000ZwqXYAS", "userName" : "cintake1@demo.com", "userProfile" : "System Administrator", "userTimeZone" : "-420", "userTimeZoneName" : "America/Los_Angeles" }
OmniDataTransform.name: PSSDRUpdateAndInsertInteractionSummary
OmniDataTransform.previewJsonData: { "DRId_PublicComplaint" : "0fhRO00000000MiYAI", "NewComplaint" : { "AdditionalDetails" : false, "Allegations" : null, "ComplaintDetails" : { "Address" : "sfgsdfgsfg", "DateReported" : "2022-05-05", "Details" : "sdsdfsf", "Email" : "sdfg@sdf.sdfg", "FirstName" : "brij", "LastName" : "reporter lastname", "LocationOfIncident" : "bangalore", "Organization" : "org", "Phone" : "2342342342", "Priority" : "Critical", "Status" : "Submitted", "Subject" : "complaint1" }, "Participants" : null, "RequestConfidentiality" : "No", "RunningNotes" : "Running Notes1" }, "data" : [ ], "timeStamp" : "2022-05-06T06:02:24.287Z", "userCurrencyCode" : "USD", "userId" : "005RQ000000HfNuYAK", "userName" : "admin238rfpss@sf.com", "userProfile" : "System Administrator", "userTimeZone" : "-420", "userTimeZoneName" : "America/Los_Angeles" }
